non_scope: Clippy policy, baseline, deny-warning wiring, or warning cleanup.
Documentation compaction, feature or runtime breadth, lock or descriptor changes, public API changes, protocol/runtime behavior changes, dependencies, devices, authority, or Manifold integration.
Rewriting any historical checker or changing any other product source expression.
objective: Replace exactly three pre-const-stabilization floating to_bits calls with their identical IEEE bit literals so the existing pinned Rust 1.80 toolchain can compile the unchanged timestamped Float32 runtime.
outputs: Exactly one f64 and two f32 const-context expressions use their bit-identical integer literals.
Focused evidence proves literal equality, unchanged initialization bytes and runtime behavior, and pinned Rust 1.80 compilation.
